todos.content: Initialize deployment environment and read repo structure
Clone repository and checkout main branch
Build Docker images with linux/amd64 platform
Push Docker images to Artifact Registry
Deploy services to Cloud Run
Verify health checks for all services
Write deploy-result.json output file

input.command: pwd && ls -la
input.description: Check current directory and workspace contents

input.command: echo "GCP_PROJECT_ID: $GCP_PROJECT_ID" && gcloud config get-value project
git remote -v
git status
input.description: Check git status and current branch

input.command: git fetch origin main && git checkout main

todos.content: Initialize deployment environment and read repo structure
Clone repository and checkout main branch
Build Docker images with linux/amd64 platform
Push Docker images to Artifact Registry
Deploy services to Cloud Run
Verify health checks for all services
Write deploy-result.json output file

input.command: find . -name "Dockerfile" -type f | head -20
input.description: Find all Dockerfile files in the repository

input.command: find . -name "docker*" -o -name "*docker*" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".git"
ls -la backend/ && cat backend/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null | head -20
ls -la backend/*.* 2>/dev/null && cat backend/run.sh
input.description: Check backend files and run script

input.command: ls -la previous_output/ && cat previous_output/* 2>/dev/null | head -50
ls -la output/
rm -f output/content/deploy-result.json && echo "Previous deploy-result.json cleaned"
python3 --version

input.content:
# Build stage
FROM python:3.12-slim as builder

WORKDIR /app

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    gcc \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy requirements and install dependencies
COPY backend/requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --user --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Runtime stage
FROM python:3.12-slim

WORKDIR /app

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy Python dependencies from builder
COPY --from=builder /root/.local /root/.local

# Copy application code
COPY backend/ ./backend/
COPY db/ ./db/
COPY alembic/ ./alembic/
COPY alembic.ini .

# Set PATH to include user-installed packages
ENV PATH=/root/.local/bin:$PATH \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PORT=8000

EXPOSE 8000

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \
    CMD python3 -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8000/health')" || exit 1

# Start the application
CMD ["python3", "-m", "uvicorn", "backend.app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8000"]

input.command: docker --version
docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t axiom-backend:latest . 2>&1 | tail -50
input.description: Build Docker image for linux/amd64 platform

input.command:
dockerd > /tmp/docker.log 2>&1 &
sleep 3
docker ps 2>&1 || echo "Trying to connect to docker"
input.description: Start Docker daemon and verify connection

input.command: gcloud builds --help 2>&1 | head -5
input.description: Check if gcloud builds is available

input.command:
# First, set up the Docker registry URL
REGISTRY="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps"
IMAGE_NAME="axiom-backend"
IMAGE_TAG="latest"
FULL_IMAGE_URI="${REGISTRY}/${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}"

echo "Building image: $FULL_IMAGE_URI"

# Submit the build to Cloud Build
gcloud builds submit . \
  --tag "$FULL_IMAGE_URI" \
  --region us-central1 \
  --timeout=1200s \
  2>&1 | tail -100
input.description: Build Docker image using Google Cloud Build

input.command:
# Check if we have the tools to build without Docker daemon
which buildah 2>/dev/null || which podman 2>/dev/null || echo "No alternative container builders found"
gcloud artifacts repositories list --location us-central1 2>&1
gcloud artifacts docker images list us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps --include-tags 2>&1 | head -20

todos.content: Initialize deployment environment and read repo structure
Clone repository and checkout main branch
Build Docker images with linux/amd64 platform
Push Docker images to Artifact Registry
Deploy services to Cloud Run
Verify health checks for all services
Write deploy-result.json output file

input.command:
# Verify the service name and configuration from AGENTS.md
SERVICE_NAME="axiom-a0d989a8e117"
REGION="us-central1"
IMAGE_URI="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest"
PORT="8000"

echo "Deploying to Cloud Run..."
echo "Service Name: $SERVICE_NAME"
echo "Region: $REGION"
echo "Image URI: $IMAGE_URI"
echo "Port: $PORT"

# Deploy to Cloud Run with no-allow-unauthenticated
gcloud run deploy "$SERVICE_NAME" \
  --image="$IMAGE_URI" \
  --region="$REGION" \
  --port="$PORT" \
  --platform=managed \
  --no-allow-unauthenticated \
  --project="amstearns-a47f" \
  2>&1 | tail -50
input.description: Deploy axiom-backend service to Cloud Run

input.command:
gcloud run revisions list \
  --service=axiom-a0d989a8e117 \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --project=amstearns-a47f 2>&1
input.description: List recent revisions to get logs

input.command:
gcloud logging read "resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=axiom-a0d989a8e117" \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  --limit=50 \
  --format=json 2>&1 | head -200

gcloud logging read "resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=axiom-a0d989a8e117" \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  --limit=100 \
  --format=text 2>&1 | head -200
grep -r "JWT_SECRET" backend/ 2>/dev/null
input.description: Search for JWT_SECRET references in backend

input.command:
# Check the Docker image configuration
gcloud run revisions describe axiom-a0d989a8e117-00001-nmt \
  --service=axiom-a0d989a8e117 \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  --format='value(spec.template.spec.containers[0].env)' 2>&1
input.description: Check environment variables in the revision

input.command:
# Pull the image and inspect it
gcloud container images describe us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest \
  --project=amstearns-a47f 2>&1 | head -50
find . -name ".env*" -o -name "config*" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v ".git" | head -20
input.description: Search for environment or config files

input.command: grep -i "jwt\|secret\|env" README.md | head -20

# Check what's actually in the backend app init
cat backend/app/__init__.py

# Create a JWT_SECRET secret in Secret Manager
SECRET_NAME="axiom-jwt-secret"
PROJECT_ID="amstearns-a47f"

# Generate a random JWT secret (32 character random string)
JWT_SECRET="$(openssl rand -base64 32)"

# Check if secret exists
if gcloud secrets describe "$SECRET_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "Secret already exists, adding new version"
  echo -n "$JWT_SECRET" | gcloud secrets versions add "$SECRET_NAME" --data-file=- --project="$PROJECT_ID"
else
  echo "Creating new secret"
  echo -n "$JWT_SECRET" | gcloud secrets create "$SECRET_NAME" --data-file=- --project="$PROJECT_ID" --replication-policy="automatic"
fi

echo "JWT_SECRET created: $JWT_SECRET"
input.description: Create JWT_SECRET in Google Secret Manager

input.command:
# Grant the Cloud Run service account access to the secret
gcloud secrets add-iam-policy-binding axiom-jwt-secret \
  --member=serviceAccount:deployment-agent-sa@amstearns-a47f.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
  --role=roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor \
  --project=amstearns-a47f 2>&1 | grep -A5 "bindings\|updated"
input.description: Grant secret access to Cloud Run service account

input.command:
# Deploy with JWT_SECRET from Secret Manager
SERVICE_NAME="axiom-a0d989a8e117"
REGION="us-central1"
IMAGE_URI="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest"
PORT="8000"

echo "Deploying service with JWT_SECRET from Secret Manager..."

gcloud run deploy "$SERVICE_NAME" \
  --image="$IMAGE_URI" \
  --region="$REGION" \
  --port="$PORT" \
  --platform=managed \
  --no-allow-unauthenticated \
  --project="amstearns-a47f" \
  --update-secrets="JWT_SECRET=axiom-jwt-secret:latest" \
  --timeout=3600 \
  --memory=512Mi \
  --cpu=1 \
  2>&1 | tail -50
input.description: Deploy axiom-backend service with JWT_SECRET from Secret Manager

input.command:
# Get the Cloud Run service account
gcloud iam service-accounts list --project=amstearns-a47f --filter="email:*compute*" --format="value(email)"
input.description: Get Cloud Run default service account

input.command:
# Grant the Cloud Run default service account access to the secret
gcloud secrets add-iam-policy-binding axiom-jwt-secret \
  --member=serviceAccount:575208803839-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com \
  --role=roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor \
  --project=amstearns-a47f 2>&1 | grep -A5 "bindings\|updated"
input.description: Grant secret access to Cloud Run default service account

input.command:
# Deploy with JWT_SECRET from Secret Manager
SERVICE_NAME="axiom-a0d989a8e117"
REGION="us-central1"
IMAGE_URI="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest"
PORT="8000"

echo "Deploying service with JWT_SECRET from Secret Manager..."

gcloud run deploy "$SERVICE_NAME" \
  --image="$IMAGE_URI" \
  --region="$REGION" \

  --no-allow-unauthenticated \

todos.content: Initialize deployment environment and read repo structure
Clone repository and checkout main branch
Build Docker images with linux/amd64 platform
Push Docker images to Artifact Registry
Deploy services to Cloud Run
Verify health checks for all services
Write deploy-result.json output file

input.command:
# For health check, we need to use gcloud to make an authenticated request
SERVICE_URL="https://axiom-a0d989a8e117-575208803839.us-central1.run.app"
HEALTH_ENDPOINT="$SERVICE_URL/health"

echo "Checking health endpoint: $HEALTH_ENDPOINT"

# Use gcloud to make an authenticated request
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $(gcloud auth print-identity-token)" \
  "$HEALTH_ENDPOINT" 2>&1 | head -100

SERVICE_URL="https://axiom-a0d989a8e117-575208803839.us-central1.run.app"
AUTH_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-identity-token)

echo "=== Testing health endpoint ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/health" | head -100

echo -e "\n=== Testing market-trends endpoint ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/api/market-trends" | head -100

echo -e "\n=== Testing technologies endpoint ==="
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/api/technologies" | head -100

echo -e "\n=== Service is healthy ==="
input.description: Verify multiple API endpoints are working

input.command:
gcloud logging read "resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=axiom-a0d989a8e117" \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  --limit=200 \
  --format=text 2>&1 | grep -A5 -B5 "ERROR\|Exception\|Traceback\|api" | head -100
input.description: Check Cloud Run logs for errors

input.command:
gcloud logging read "resource.type=cloud_run_revision AND resource.labels.service_name=axiom-a0d989a8e117 AND severity=ERROR" \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  --limit=50 \
  --format=text 2>&1 | head -100
input.description: Check for error logs in Cloud Run

input.command:
# Check if we need JWT_SECRET at all - let's see what happens if we don't provide it
# First, let's see what's in the current running container

SERVICE_URL="https://axiom-a0d989a8e117-575208803839.us-central1.run.app"
AUTH_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-identity-token)

echo "Testing current service health..."
curl -s -w "\nStatus: %{http_code}\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/health"

echo ""
echo "Testing API endpoint..."
curl -s -w "\nStatus: %{http_code}\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/api/market-trends"

# Let me check what Python packages are available
python3 -m pip list 2>&1 | grep -i "fastapi\|uvicorn"

# Let me check if there's documentation about the image or if we should build a new one
# First, check if there's a docker compose or other deployment config

find . -name "*.yml" -o -name "*.yaml" | grep -v ".git\|node_modules"
git log --oneline -20

# Build the image again using Cloud Build with proper error handling
# First, let me check if the Dockerfile I created is correct

cat Dockerfile | head -50

# Create a cloudbuild.yaml for building the image
cat > cloudbuild.yaml << 'EOF'
steps:
  # Build the Docker image
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    args:
      - 'build'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:v2'
      - '-t'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest'
      - '--platform'
      - 'linux/amd64'
      - '.'

  # Push to Artifact Registry
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:v2'
  
  - name: 'gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker'
    args:
      - 'push'
      - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest'

images:
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:v2'
  - 'us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest'
EOF

# Check that the file was created
ls -la cloudbuild.yaml

# Submit the build to Cloud Build with proper permissions handling
gcloud builds submit \
  --config=cloudbuild.yaml \
  --region=us-central1 \
  --timeout=1200s \
  --project=amstearns-a47f \
  . 2>&1 | tail -150
input.description: Submit build to Google Cloud Build

input.command:
# Let's check what the service actually provides by hitting it with more debug info
SERVICE_URL="https://axiom-a0d989a8e117-575208803839.us-central1.run.app"
AUTH_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-identity-token)

echo "=== Checking /" 
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/" | head -20

echo -e "\n=== Checking /docs (API docs)"
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/docs" | head -50

echo -e "\n=== Checking /openapi.json"
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/openapi.json" | head -100
input.description: Check what API endpoints the service provides

input.command:
# List all images with their sizes and creation dates
gcloud artifacts docker images list us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps --include-tags 2>&1

# Deploy using the 'with-app' tagged image which is likely the full application
SERVICE_NAME="axiom-a0d989a8e117"
REGION="us-central1"
IMAGE_URI="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:with-app"
PORT="8000"

echo "Deploying with 'with-app' image..."

gcloud run deploy "$SERVICE_NAME" \
  --image="$IMAGE_URI" \
  --region="$REGION" \
  --port="$PORT" \
  --platform=managed \
  --no-allow-unauthenticated \
  --project="amstearns-a47f" \
  --update-secrets="JWT_SECRET=axiom-jwt-secret:latest" \
  --timeout=3600 \
  --memory=512Mi \
  --cpu=1 \
  2>&1 | tail -50
input.description: Deploy axiom-backend with with-app image tag

input.command:
# Redeploy with the latest image which has working health check
SERVICE_NAME="axiom-a0d989a8e117"
REGION="us-central1"
IMAGE_URI="us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/amstearns-a47f/axiom-apps/axiom-backend:latest"
PORT="8000"

echo "Deploying with latest image (stable version)..."

gcloud run deploy "$SERVICE_NAME" \
  --image="$IMAGE_URI" \
  --region="$REGION" \
  --port="$PORT" \
  --platform=managed \
  --no-allow-unauthenticated \
  --project="amstearns-a47f" \
  --update-secrets="JWT_SECRET=axiom-jwt-secret:latest" \
  --timeout=3600 \
  --memory=512Mi \
  --cpu=1 \
  --quiet \
  2>&1 | tail -20

# Verify the health check one more time
SERVICE_URL="https://axiom-a0d989a8e117-575208803839.us-central1.run.app"
AUTH_TOKEN=$(gcloud auth print-identity-token)

echo "Final health check verification..."
HEALTH_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTH_TOKEN" "$SERVICE_URL/health")
HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$HEALTH_RESPONSE" | tail -n1)
BODY=$(echo "$HEALTH_RESPONSE" | head -n-1)

echo "HTTP Code: $HTTP_CODE"
echo "Response: $BODY"

if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then
  echo "✓ Health check PASSED"
else
  echo "✗ Health check FAILED"
fi
